texto: Taste” is a noun and a verb: We all have it and we all do it. But we don’t all have a language or a system for understanding and expressing that experience… I knew chocolate was something I didn’t want to lose, but I didn’t have the words to communicate why it was so important to me, or the knowledge on how best to save it. Now I do.
explicacao: Citação de Simran Sethi sobre temas ligados a sabedoria. “Taste” is a noun and a verb: We all have it and we all do it. But we don’t all have a language or…” articula sabedoria, biodiversity, chocolate em registro de sabedoria, com relevância para contextos como chocolate e food.

frase_original: Taste” is a noun and a verb: We all have it and we all do it. But we don’t all have a language or a system for understanding and expressing that experience… I knew chocolate was something I didn’t want to lose, but I didn’t have the words to communicate why it was so important to me, or the knowledge on how best to save it. Now I do.
